positive: A mesmerizing and elegant minimalist illustration featuring a lone fox sitting atop a crescent moon. The fox is rendered in a stylized, graceful silhouette with flowing tails and detailed fur texture. The background is a gradient blend of deep indigo, midnight blue, and soft lavender, evoking a celestial, dreamlike atmosphere. Incorporated floral elements, such as stylized night-blooming jasmine and ethereal lavender sprigs, curl around the base. Composition must be highly symmetrical and centered for optimal apparel placement. Art style: Detailed linework, stained glass effect texture combined with modern vector illustration. Strong backlighting and contrast to make the fox and moon pop against the deep background. Highly printable and scalable design.
negative: blur, low quality, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, grainy, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, copyright, messy, cluttered
